## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or PII in the diff; no hooks bypassed
- [ ] Commits are atomic and follow Conventional Commits (`.gitmessage`)
- [ ] Any changed `README.md` has its `README.zh.md` counterpart updated
